title: Default change "Add newly selected boards to all existing widgets". Can it be switched to 'unchecked'
excerpt: Hey monday team, I have noticed when creating a lot of dashboards, it is very easy to accidently leave this checkbox on, and mess up all the widgets on your dashboard. It is time consuming to reverse the change. Suggesti…

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey monday team, I have noticed when creating a lot of dashboards, it is very easy to accidently leave this checkbox on, and mess up all the widgets on your dashboard. It is time consuming to reverse the change. Suggestion is to have it unticked as default - if someone makes the mistake of not ticking it, they can disconnect and reconnect the boards + tick the checkbox, which is a lot quicker than the current situation. Alternative would be to have the undo button pop up after connecting new boards to a dashboard. Thanks

posts.author: calum (Calum)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be great - I had not even seen that tickbox and have found the default setting really frustrating.

Also, when I raised this with the chatbot it said there was now way to change the auto-connect to all widgets, and it was only in here that I was alerted to the tickbox.
